{{Quote|You with the Selkath? You here to see me about the murder too? I told the damn fish everything I knew, what more do you all want from me?|Firith to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Firith Me''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Pazaak/Legends|pazaak]] addict staying at the [[Visitor's Hotel]] in [[Ahto City]] on [[Manaan/Legends|Manaan]] during the [[Jedi Civil War]]. In [[3956 BBY]], he was a witness in the [[Sunry]] case. During the case, he met the former [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] and revealed to him that the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Elassa Huros]] was in fact a [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] that Sunry [[Death/Legends|killed]]. He was also a [[Pazaak Weekly]] reader.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Although Firith Me is a pazaak player, the player can not play pazaak with him. The player can bribe or threaten Firith Me to testify, the latter of which will earn them dark side points.

In the PC version, Firith's character model is changed from the model used for him when first seen, to a model similar to [[Gerlon Two-Fingers]] when he makes his appearance at the trial.
